subject: DSA/DSS key algorithm
truth: Stop using DSA/DSS keys; they are no longer supported.
quote: DSA/DSS key algorithm support is removed in 4.0.0.

subject: SHA-1 RSA signature verification
truth: Stop using SHA-1 RSA signatures; they are no longer verified.
quote: SHA-1 RSA signature verification is removed in 5.0.0.

subject: SHA-1 key exchange methods
truth: Stop using SHA-1 based Diffie-Hellman key exchange methods; they are removed.
quote: The SHA-1 key exchange methods `diffie-hellman-group-exchange-sha1`, `diffie-hellman-group14-sha1`, and `diffie-hellman-group1-sha1` are removed in 5.0.0.

subject: GSSAPI support
truth: Stop using GSSAPI authentication; it is no longer supported.

subject: Python 2 and Python < 3.6 support
truth: Stop using Python 2 or Python versions below 3.6; they are no longer supported.
quote: Python 2 and Python < 3.6 support is dropped in 3.0.0.

subject: paramiko.py3compat module
truth: Stop importing paramiko.py3compat; the module is removed.

subject: paramiko.common.asbytes
truth: Stop using paramiko.common.asbytes; use paramiko.util.asbytes instead.

subject: PKey.__cmp__ ordering comparison
truth: Stop using PKey.__cmp__ for ordering comparisons; it is removed.
quote: The `PKey.__cmp__` ordering comparison is removed in 3.0.0.

subject: paramiko.util.retry_on_signal
truth: Stop using paramiko.util.retry_on_signal; it is removed.

subject: paramiko.__all__
truth: Stop using paramiko.__all__; it is removed.

subject: ed25519, invoke, and all packaging extras
old: ed25519, invoke, and all packaging extras
truth: Stop using the ed25519, invoke, and all packaging extras; they are removed.
quote: The `ed25519`, `invoke`, and `all` packaging extras are removed in 4.0.0.

from_fact: ed25519, invoke, and all packaging extras

subject: PKey.from_path argument
truth: Stop using passphrase= in PKey.from_path; use password= instead.
quote: The `PKey.from_path` argument is renamed from `passphrase` to `password` in 5.0.0 (backwards incompatible).

subject: SSHConfig proxycommand behavior
old: proxycommand was deleted when not set
truth: SSHConfig now sets proxycommand to None instead of deleting the key when no proxy is configured.
quote: `SSHConfig` now preserves `proxycommand` as `None` instead of deleting it in 3.0.0.

from_fact: proxycommand was deleted when not set

subject: minimum DH group-exchange modulus
truth: The minimum DH group-exchange modulus is now 2048 bits; connections using 1024-bit groups will fail.
quote: The minimum DH group-exchange modulus increased from 1024 to 2048 bits in 5.0.0.

subject: RSA public-key algorithm preference
truth: RSA public-key algorithms now prefer SHA2 over SHA1; SHA1-based RSA may stop working.
quote: RSA public-key algorithms now prefer SHA2 over SHA1 as of 2.9.0.

subject: PKey.write_private_key method organization
new: child classes no longer override write_private_key
truth: PKey.write_private_key methods were reorganized; child classes no longer override them, so custom subclasses will break.
quote: `PKey.write_private_key` methods were reorganized in 5.0.0; child classes no longer override them.

from_fact: child classes no longer override write_private_key
